title: Executive Order 9430—Inspection by the Office of Price Administration of Corporation Statistical Transcript Cards Prepared from Income and Declared Value Excess-Profits Tax Returns

flags.justification: A narrow, specific inter-agency information-access authorization.
Access is explicitly bounded by compliance with existing Treasury regulations (Treasury Decision 5173).
An inter-agency information-sharing authorization, not a compliance regime against private parties.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
The authorization is explicitly bounded to a specific tax-year window rather than open-ended.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
This is inter-governmental data sharing bounded by existing confidentiality regulations, not a private-party compliance regime.
A narrow, technical information-sharing arrangement necessary for wartime price administration.
A cooperative, bounded information-sharing arrangement between Treasury and OPA.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
